# Raw Reference Files

These PDFs are visual/form-layout references only and are NOT used in
deterministic Layer 1 tests. They live outside the repo at:

    C:/Users/user/Desktop/BID_GUARDRAIL_TEST_INPUTSQUOTE/ADEL_IPSI_CANONICAL_TEST_001/

Files:
- Adel Blank Bid Document.pdf — Iowa DOT proposal form layout reference
- Adel Missing subtotal and total.pdf — Handwritten/scanned bid (noisy; future extraction challenge)
- IPSI QUOTE.pdf — Raw quote PDF ($78,513.75 total shown on page)

These are Layer 2 (Normalizer/Extraction) concerns, not Layer 1 (Core Guardrail).
